body_txt: If a character is Trapped in Another World and then gets embroiled in such a romance, they often end up saying I Choose to Stay . If they are forced apart, or decide to return to their own worlds , then they are Star-Crossed Lovers . They may still get a Doppelgänger Replacement Love Interest back at home. Such relationships often result in the creation of a Half-Human Hybrid . Compare Paranormal Romance , Magical Girlfriend , Magic Contract Romance , Boy Meets Ghoul , Interspecies Romance , Time-Travel Romance and Muggle–Mage Romance .
